# HarmonyOS Skills Pack - Machine Readable Index

This repository is a reusable skills pack installable via git clone.

## Skills
- harmonyos-ark
  - canonical: skills/harmonyos-ark/SKILL.md
  - claude-entry: .claude/skills/harmonyos-ark/SKILL.md
  - copilot-entry: .github/skills/harmonyos-ark/SKILL.md

- arkts-modernization-guard
  - canonical: skills/arkts-modernization-guard/SKILL.md
  - claude-entry: .claude/skills/arkts-modernization-guard/SKILL.md
  - copilot-entry: .github/skills/arkts-modernization-guard/SKILL.md

- universal-product-quality
  - canonical: skills/universal-product-quality/SKILL.md
  - claude-entry: .claude/skills/universal-product-quality/SKILL.md
  - copilot-entry: .github/skills/universal-product-quality/SKILL.md
  - codex-entry: .codex/skills/harmonyos-ark/SKILL.md
  - codex-entry: .codex/skills/arkts-modernization-guard/SKILL.md
  - codex-entry: .codex/skills/universal-product-quality/SKILL.md

## Quick Install
- npx: npx harmonyos-skills-pack
- npx (China mirror): npx harmonyos-skills-pack --mirror
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/harmonyos-skills-pack

## Install
- scripts/install-skills.sh
- scripts/uninstall-skills.sh

## Maintenance
- canonical source is skills/
- run scripts/sync-skills.sh after modifying skills/
